intro.speaker: Leo
intro.text: Today's the day. Donut House closes at 5pm.

intro.speaker: Leo
intro.text: I need to get Warren, MJ, Carson, and Justin first.

warren_meet.speaker: Warren
warren_meet.text: Leo! I heard you were going to Donut House!

warren_meet.speaker: Warren
warren_meet.text: I'm in. But Grace is out front and she's got a pool noodle...

warren_after_grace.speaker: Warren
warren_after_grace.text: YES! She's down! I saw the whole thing from the window!

warren_after_grace.speaker: Leo
warren_after_grace.text: Your sister hits hard. Come on, let's go.

warren_after_grace.speaker: Warren
warren_after_grace.text: I've got my slingshot. Nobody's stopping us now.

warren_join.speaker: Warren
warren_join.text: That's what I'm talking about! Let's go get those donuts.

warren_join.speaker: Warren
warren_join.text: I've got my slingshot. Nobody's stopping us now.

mj_meet.speaker: MJ
mj_meet.text: Donut run?! Say no more. I'm so in.

mj_meet.speaker: MJ
mj_meet.text: My brother Max has been blocking the driveway all morning.

mj_join.speaker: MJ
mj_join.text: I'll push anything out of our way. Let's ride.

carson_meet.speaker: Carson
carson_meet.text: I saw you coming from two blocks away.

carson_meet.speaker: Carson
carson_meet.text: Donut House. I knew it. I'm ready.

carson_meet.speaker: Carson
carson_meet.text: Nora's around back by the pool. She's in a mood.

carson_join.speaker: Carson
carson_join.text: Didn't even see it coming. That's my whole thing.

carson_join.speaker: Carson
carson_join.text: Stay close and stay quiet. I know the shortcuts.

carson_after_nora.speaker: Carson
carson_after_nora.text: SHE'S DOWN! I've been waiting for that all summer.

carson_after_nora.speaker: Leo
carson_after_nora.text: How long was she hiding in those cabinets?!

carson_after_nora.speaker: Carson
carson_after_nora.text: Like... all day. She takes this very seriously.

carson_after_nora.speaker: Carson
carson_after_nora.text: Alright, I'm in. Let's go get those donuts.

justin_meet.speaker: Justin
justin_meet.text: BRO. I've been waiting all week for a donut run.

justin_meet.speaker: Justin
justin_meet.text: Max is guarding the street with a bat. AND he's somehow electric?

justin_meet.speaker: Justin
justin_meet.text: I know. Doesn't matter. Let's go.

justin_join.speaker: Justin
justin_join.text: YEAH! Full crew! Nobody's faster than us.

justin_join.speaker: Justin
justin_join.text: I'll get us there in no time. Follow me!

justin_after_max.speaker: Justin
justin_after_max.text: BRO. You just beat my electric brother with a FART.

justin_after_max.speaker: Justin
justin_after_max.text: He's been doing that zap thing since he found those batteries.

justin_after_max.speaker: Justin
justin_after_max.text: OK. Full squad. Let's GO. Donuts won't wait forever.
